backend/main.mo: Defines Product and Farm types, seeds in‑memory maps of farms and products, and exposes query methods for fetching items by ID, category, name, and farm.
feature_evidence.json: Describes feature evidence for adding a cart header button and cart page, listing involved files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Contains prewritten summaries for various frontend files describing layout, pages, components, hooks, and styles.
frontend/index.css: Implements Tailwind layers and OKLCH-based CSS variables for light and dark themes with global background and text styling.
frontend/index.html: Provides the root HTML shell including metadata and script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with all routes including the /cart route and renders the router provider.
frontend/src/components/farms/FarmCard.t: Renders a farm card with image, location, description, and a link to the farm details page.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteFoote: Displays footer with brand info, quick links, and caffeine.ai attribution using dynamic year and hostname.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteHeade: Responsive header with logo, navigation links, cart icon button, and mobile sheet menu navigation.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteLayou: Wraps pages with shared header, footer, and main outlet region.
frontend/src/components/products/Product: Shows a product card with image, stock badge, category, pricing, and link to product details.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous actor and refreshes dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides context and helpers for managing Internet Identity authentication and state via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching products and farms using the actor from useActor.
frontend/src/index.css: Configures Tailwind CSS and defines theme variables for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders a static About page describing Farm2Retail’s mission and values.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Displays an empty cart state with a prompt to browse products.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Shows contact information and a simple contact form with submission feedback.
frontend/src/pages/FarmDetailsPage.tsx: Displays detailed farm information and its products, handling loading states and fallbacks.
frontend/src/pages/FarmsPage.tsx: Fetches and lists all farms with loading skeletons and empty-state messaging.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the homepage with a hero section, value propositions, and navigation to products and farms.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailsPage.ts: Shows detailed product info with farm data, badges, pricing, and loading placeholders.
frontend/src/pages/ProductsPage.tsx: Lists all products with search and category filtering, including skeletons and empty states.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind theme, colors, fonts, animations, and plugin integrations.
project_state.json: Defines the current Farm2Retail project state, including schema version, high-level summary, and a list of implemented features with their requirements and versions.
